title: Service Meta

fields.label: Hero summary
fields.name: hero_summary
fields.instructions: Override the registry default summary shown under the H1. Aim for under 220 characters.

fields.label: Price (starting at)
fields.name: price_starting_at
fields.instructions: Public-facing range. Examples: "Starts at $7,800" or "From $185/month". Leave empty to suppress the pricing block.

fields.label: Turnaround / timeline
fields.name: turnaround
fields.instructions: Examples: "3-5 weeks" or "Same-day for active customers".

fields.label: Pricing disclaimer
fields.name: pricing_disclaimer
fields.instructions: Optional. Replaces the default disclaimer about written quotes.

fields.label: What's included
fields.name: includes
fields.instructions: Override the registry default "What's included" list. Aim for 6 items.

fields.label: FAQs
fields.name: faqs
fields.instructions: Override the registry default FAQs. Each FAQ is also emitted as JSON-LD for SERP rich results.

fields.label: Related service areas
fields.name: related_areas
fields.instructions: Cross-link to up to 3 service-area pages (Phase 2D).

description: Per-page overrides for service pages. All fields fall back to the registry defaults in showtime-pools-core/includes/data/services.php when empty.
